substep.title: Check for External Tracker Reference
substep.action: Inspect the ticket body for references like "GH-NNN" or "Issue #NNN" or "Linear: ABC-NNN" or "Jira: PROJ-NNN". If found, set {{has_tracker}} = true.

substep.title: Confirm Mode with User
substep.action: Store the user's choice as {{pr_mode}} = true | false.
